## Summary

What changed and why?

## Testing

- [ ] I tested the extension locally.
- [ ] I ran `npm run typecheck`.
- [ ] I ran `npm run lint`.
- [ ] I ran `npm test`.
- [ ] I ran `npm run build`.

## Review Checklist

- [ ] I considered storage/schema compatibility.
- [ ] I avoided unnecessary permissions.
- [ ] I did not add remote code execution or remote hosted JavaScript.
- [ ] I did not add analytics, telemetry, tracking, accounts, billing, or backend services.
- [ ] I updated docs if behavior changed.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where appropriate.
- [ ] I avoided sharing private prompt content or user data.

## Screenshots

Add screenshots for visible UI changes when useful.

## Notes For Reviewers

Mention storage migrations, import/export changes, permission changes, or known tradeoffs.
